title: casparia unilateralis
intro: Casparia unilateralis, also known as the Mexican buckthorn, is a shrub or small tree native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Casparia unilateralis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", casparia unilateralis benefits include the prevention of stress-induced lesions in the stomach and the inhibition of gastric secretion.
